results.justification: EXACT TWIN — unified low-rank gradient subspace + joint full+low-rank update + continual learning IS the hierarchical nested null-space + breath-velocity LR scheduler mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — gradient null-space projection + per-task subspace + forgetting mitigation IS the per-register null-space projection mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — per-task low-rank gradient subspace + jointly-update continual fine-tune IS the 4-register hierarchical projection mechanism.
Grassmannian rank-1 geodesic + historical subspace reuse overlaps with hierarchical nested null-space + register-transition mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — orthogonal gradient projection + parameter-efficient continual + PEGP framework IS the register-projection + transition-gate mechanism.
Common null space + shared cross-task null-space overlaps with hierarchical nested null-space mechanism.
Randomized gradient subspace sampling overlaps with fractional/partial-hole projection mechanism.
Per-head LoRA partition + multi-task diversity overlaps with per-register projection partitioning mechanism.
